title: Tender Australian Collard Salad
description: A winey, silky salad featuring collard greens, roasted beet, avocado and a buttery beurre-monte sauce that showcases adventurous Australian flavours.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium heat and add 1 tbsp of olive oil; sauté the beet cubes until just tender, about 5 minutes, then set aside.
Blanch the collard greens in a pot of boiling salted water for 1 minute, shock in ice water, and drain thoroughly.

In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tbsp of olive oil, minced garlic, and dried oregano; cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds, then pour in the white wine, reduce by half, and stir in the lemon juice, salt, and pepper to create a beurre-monte sauce.
Toss the blanched collard greens, sautéed beet, sliced onion, diced avocado, and toasted almonds in a large bowl.
Pour the beurre-monte sauce over the salad and toss gently to coat all ingredients evenly.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately, pairing with a chilled glass of dry white wine.
